use_cases: Expandable FAQ sections on support or help pages
Collapsible documentation or knowledge base sections
Settings panels with grouped configuration options
Product detail pages with expandable specifications or reviews
Navigation menus with hierarchical collapsible sections
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible accordion component built on Base UI primitives with smooth height transitions and a rotating chevron indicator. Features keyboard navigation support with focus-visible rings and integrates seamlessly into any design system via Tailwind CSS utility classes. The component exports composable sub-components for Item, Trigger, and Panel that can be combined flexibly for various disclosure patterns.
